title: Speed-to-value message resonates in 62% of discovery calls
anchor: Gong transcript analysis shows the speed-to-value frame re-stated by prospects in 17 of 27 sampled April calls.
connect: Platform-consolidation frame appears in just 19% of the same call sample.
body: Gong transcript analysis shows the speed-to-value frame re-stated by prospects in 17 of 27 sampled April calls. Platform-consolidation frame appears in just 19% of the same call sample.
trace: Discovery call message pickup from April Gong sample shows speed-to-value landing consistently.

title: Beacon Systems win rate jumps to 64% in head-to-head deals
anchor: Q2 competitive outcomes show 14-8 record versus Beacon in 22 direct matchups.
connect: Prior four-quarter average ran at 28% win rate versus the same competitor.
body: Q2 competitive outcomes show 14-8 record versus Beacon in 22 direct matchups. Prior four-quarter average ran at 28% win rate versus the same competitor.
trace: Dramatic Beacon win rate improvement from 28% historical to 63.6% in Q2 head-to-head deals.

title: Battlecard opens doubled to 61% on competitive deals
anchor: Q2 2026 competitive opportunities show 38 of 62 reps opened the Beacon Systems battlecard.
connect: Q1 battlecard utilization sat at 22% across competitive deals.
body: Q2 2026 competitive opportunities show 38 of 62 reps opened the Beacon Systems battlecard. Q1 battlecard utilization sat at 22% across competitive deals.
trace: Significant battlecard adoption increase from 22% in Q1 to 61% in Q2 for Beacon competitive deals.

title: ICP match rate climbs to 78% on new logo wins
anchor: Q2 2026 closed deals show 28 of 36 new customers fitting the ideal customer profile.
connect: Q1 ICP alignment ran at 64% across new logo closings.
body: Q2 2026 closed deals show 28 of 36 new customers fitting the ideal customer profile. Q1 ICP alignment ran at 64% across new logo closings.
trace: ICP alignment improvement from 64% in Q1 to 78% in Q2 on new customer wins.

title: Verge IO surfaces in 24% of competitive opportunities
anchor: Q2 deals show Verge IO appeared in 18 of 75 total competitive situations this quarter.
connect: Q1 presence sat at 11% across the same competitive deal set.
body: Q2 deals show Verge IO appeared in 18 of 75 total competitive situations this quarter. Q1 presence sat at 11% across the same competitive deal set.
trace: Verge IO competitive presence doubled from Q1 to Q2, following their $40M Series B in March.

title: April launch generates $420K pipeline in first three weeks
anchor: CRM Sync launch tracking shows 14 new opportunities totaling $420,000 since April 8.
body: CRM Sync launch tracking shows 14 new opportunities totaling $420,000 since April 8. October launch first-three-week pipeline reached $310,000.
trace: April 8 CRM Sync launch outperforming October launch by $110K in first three weeks.

title: Launch enablement adoption reaches 71% in first two weeks
anchor: Asset tracking shows 27 of 38 reps opened the battlecard or one-pager within 14 days of April 8.
connect: Prior launch adoption sat at 42% over the same window.
body: Asset tracking shows 27 of 38 reps opened the battlecard or one-pager within 14 days of April 8. Prior launch adoption sat at 42% over the same window.
trace: Significant improvement in launch asset adoption from 42% to 71% between October and April launches.

title: Launch attribution reaches 18% of Q2 net new pipeline
anchor: Q2 pipeline tracking shows $620,000 launch-attributable versus $3,400,000 total net new.
connect: Launch-driven pipeline crossed 18% of total new opportunity creation this quarter.
body: Q2 pipeline tracking shows $620,000 launch-attributable versus $3,400,000 total net new. Launch-driven pipeline crossed 18% of total new opportunity creation this quarter.
trace: Launch-attributable pipeline representing significant 18% share of Q2 net new pipeline creation.

title: Northstar objection handling lifts win rate to 51%
anchor: Head-to-head deals versus Northstar show 51% win rate since the April 8 battlecard update.
connect: Pre-April 8 win rate versus Northstar ran at 42%.
body: Head-to-head deals versus Northstar show 51% win rate since the April 8 battlecard update. Pre-April 8 win rate versus Northstar ran at 42%.
trace: Northstar objection section added April 8 correlates with 9-point win rate improvement.

title: Northstar mentions drop 22% after objection section goes live
anchor: Gong call analysis shows Northstar references decreased 22% in the four weeks following battlecard update.
connect: Objection-handling section went live on April 8 across the sales team.
body: Gong call analysis shows Northstar references decreased 22% in the four weeks following battlecard update. Objection-handling section went live on April 8 across the sales team.
trace: Northstar competitive mentions declining after objection handling section launched April 8.

title: Close reason capture rate improves to 92% in Q2
anchor: CRM tracking shows 47 of 51 closed deals include structured outcome reasons this quarter.
connect: Q1 capture rate sat at 71% across closed opportunities.
body: CRM tracking shows 47 of 51 closed deals include structured outcome reasons this quarter. Q1 capture rate sat at 71% across closed opportunities.
trace: Significant improvement in close reason data quality from 71% to 92% Q1 to Q2.

title: Enterprise inbound jumps $290K with new positioning hook
anchor: Q2 enterprise inbound pipeline shows $290,000 with the refreshed messaging framework.
connect: Inbound-to-meeting conversion lifted 8 percentage points over the same period.
body: Q2 enterprise inbound pipeline shows $290,000 with the refreshed messaging framework. Inbound-to-meeting conversion lifted 8 percentage points over the same period.
trace: New positioning driving both enterprise inbound volume and conversion rate improvement.

title: ICP-aligned deals close 12 days faster than non-ICP wins
anchor: Deal velocity analysis shows ICP-matching customers close 12 days ahead of non-ICP wins on average.
connect: ICP match rate reached 78% of new logo closings in Q2.
body: Deal velocity analysis shows ICP-matching customers close 12 days ahead of non-ICP wins on average. ICP match rate reached 78% of new logo closings in Q2.
trace: Clear velocity advantage for ICP-aligned deals at 12-day improvement versus non-ICP wins.

title: Earned media pickup reaches 42% on April launch
anchor: Launch coverage analysis shows 22 of 53 targeted publications picked up the CRM Sync announcement.
connect: Prior launch pickup rate ran at 28% across the same media list.
body: Launch coverage analysis shows 22 of 53 targeted publications picked up the CRM Sync announcement. Prior launch pickup rate ran at 28% across the same media list.
trace: Earned media performance improved from 28% to 42% pickup rate between October and April launches.

title: Launch week pipeline runs 2x the prior launch pace
anchor: First-seven-day pipeline from April 8 launch reached 2.0 times the October launch opening week.
connect: Earned media pickup rate reached 42% versus the prior launch's 28%.
body: First-seven-day pipeline from April 8 launch reached 2.0 times the October launch opening week. Earned media pickup rate reached 42% versus the prior launch's 28%.
trace: April launch first-week pipeline dramatically outperforming October with 2x velocity.

title: May launch readiness locks 10 days before ship
anchor: Forecast Pro launch shows all three readiness items cleared by May 5 for the May 15 ship date.
connect: Prior launch positioning brief signed off just 2 days before ship.
body: Forecast Pro launch shows all three readiness items cleared by May 5 for the May 15 ship date. Prior launch positioning brief signed off just 2 days before ship.
trace: Significant launch preparation improvement with 10-day buffer versus 2-day last-minute prior launch.

title: Exit interview themes surface in 31% of Beacon competitive deals
anchor: April customer interviews revealed implementation timeline and integration breadth as positioning themes.
connect: Both themes appear in 31% of Q2 Beacon Systems competitive situations.
body: April customer interviews revealed implementation timeline and integration breadth as positioning themes. Both themes appear in 31% of Q2 Beacon Systems competitive situations.
trace: Customer exit interview themes showing up consistently in Beacon competitive deals at 31% frequency.

title: Mid-market positioning drives 31% close rate versus 13% enterprise
anchor: Q2 refreshed speed-to-value hierarchy shows mid-market closing at 31% versus enterprise at 13%.
connect: Both segments received the same message framework and positioning approach.
body: Q2 refreshed speed-to-value hierarchy shows mid-market closing at 31% versus enterprise at 13%. Both segments received the same message framework and positioning approach.
trace: Clear segment performance gap with mid-market significantly outperforming enterprise on same positioning.

title: Verge IO concentrates highest in mid-market segment
anchor: Competitive analysis shows Verge IO presence concentrated in mid-market deal flow.
connect: Overall Q2 competitive appearance reached 24% across all segments.
body: Competitive analysis shows Verge IO presence concentrated in mid-market deal flow. Overall Q2 competitive appearance reached 24% across all segments.
trace: Verge IO showing segment-specific concentration in mid-market where Atlas messaging performs strongest.
